name: ESCO TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: ESCO Technologies Inc. (NYSE: ESE) is a global provider of highly engineered components and systems serving aerospace, defense, naval, and industrial markets. Its three segments include Aerospace & Defense (filtration, fluid control, naval signature management), Utility Solutions Group (diagnostic instruments for electric utilities and renewable energy), and RF Test & Measurement (RF shielding, test facilities, and measurement systems). Products span hydraulic filters, dissolved gas analyzers, wind/solar decision tools, and electromagnetic shielding rooms.

products.name: Hydraulic Filter Elements
products.description: Specialty filtration and fluid control devices for aerospace and defense applications manufactured by PTI and Crissair.

products.name: Naval Magnetic Signature Management Systems
products.description: Systems providing magnetic and electric field countermeasures for surface ships and submarines to prevent detection.

products.name: Naval Power Control and Conversion Systems
products.description: Ultra-quiet motors driving critical ship propulsion systems with low vibration for stealth capabilities.

products.name: Miniature Electro-Explosive Devices
products.description: Devices for military aircraft ejection seats and missile arming, manufactured by Mayday.

products.name: Syntactic Foam Components
products.description: Custom syntactic foam buoyancy and specialty components for industrial, oceanographic, military, and naval applications by CMT.

products.name: Diagnostic Testing and Data Management Solutions
products.description: Doble instruments assessing integrity of high-voltage power delivery equipment for electric grid operators.

products.name: Dissolved Gas Analysis Solutions
products.description: Morgan Schaffer integrated dissolved gas analysis and oil testing solutions for monitoring power transformer health.

products.name: Calisto R9 Dissolved Gas Analyzer
products.description: Patented dissolved gas analyzer developed by Doble for transformer condition monitoring.

products.name: Wind and Solar Decision Support Tools
products.description: NRG Systems global market-leading tools for the renewable energy industry, primarily wind and solar.

products.name: RF Test Facilities and Measurement Systems
products.description: ETS-Lindgren turnkey RF shielded rooms, anechoic chambers, and measurement systems for compliance and R&D testing.

products.name: RF Absorptive Materials and Antennas
products.description: ETS-Lindgren components including filters, antennas, field probes, test cells, and measurement software.

products.name: High Altitude Electromagnetic Protection (HEMP) Filters
products.description: MPE high-performance filters for military, utility, telecom and critical infrastructure applications.

products.name: Feedthrough Capacitors and Power Line Filters
products.description: MPE high-performance feedthrough capacitors and high-current power/data/control line filters.

products.name: NERC CIP Compliance Tools
products.description: Doble software tools for electric utility regulatory compliance with NERC CIP standards.

products.name: Proprietary Measurement Software
products.description: ETS-Lindgren software for performing a variety of RF tests and measurements.
